notes: Root cause: utils::paste() blocks main thread ~644ms. Strong evidence of fixed internal delay. Read utils.rs to confirm. No product code modified.

action_summary: PB-1 follow-up: utils::paste root cause confirmed in clipboard.rs
source_action: Follow-up read-only investigation of utils::paste — confirm root cause of 644ms latency
notes: Root cause: two thread::sleep in paste_via_clipboard (clipboard.rs:87,128). Sleep1=60ms (paste_delay_ms default). Sleep2=450ms (Windows hardcoded floor in max(paste_delay_ms,450)). Total sleep=510ms + ~134ms overhead = 644ms. Fix target: reduce 450ms floor empirically.
